home.checkDeadlines: Check deadlines before the object stops.
home.fetchError: Couldn't load data — check your connection and pull down to refresh
home.tip1: Before inspecting scaffolding, make sure you have a harness and helmet.
home.tip2: Wind over 15 m/s — stop all work at height.
home.tip3: Harness inspection: check seams and buckles, not just the strap.
home.tip4: Photos make a report 3× more credible — capture every change.
home.tip5: Scaffolding feet must stand on firm, level ground.
home.tip6: Two independent anchor points are always safer than one.
home.tip7: Wet scaffolding is twice as dangerous — check planks for rot.
